Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 104 

REV_CNTR_NDC_QTY 

LABEL: Revenue Center National Drug Code (NDC) Quantity 

DESCRIPTION: The quantity dispensed for the drug reflected on the revenue center line item. 

SHORT NAME: REV_CNTR_NDC_QTY 

LONG NAME: REV_CNTR_NDC_QTY 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): IP revenue 
SNF revenue 
HH revenue 
OP revenue 

VALUES: —
